message.entry: Algorithm did not succeed.\nInternal error in library SuiteSparseQR.
Invalid data type. First argument must be double.
Invalid data type. Second argument must be double.
Three input syntax only supported for sparse matrices.
Invalid data type. First argument must be double or single.
Input must be a sparse double matrix.
First input H must be a sparse double matrix.
Second input TAU must be a dense double row vector of length P.
Third input PINV must be a dense INT64 row vector of length M, with all elements between 0 and M-1.
Fourth input X must be a double matrix with M rows.
Fifth input TRANSPOSE must be a logical scalar.
Multiplying real Q with complex X is not supported.
Order must be a logical scalar.
Tolerance must be a real double scalar.
